name: Climax Studios
short_description: Climax Studios works with the world's top developers on the headline games that define our industry
about:
Climax Studios works with the world's top developers on the headline games that define our industry.

Creative, art, tech solutions, full game development: whatever our clients and collaborators need, they know we can deliver.

In August 2024, Climax opened a new studio in Edinburgh, adding to their existing offices in London, Portsmouth, and Liverpool.

news.title: Climax opens new studio in Scotland
